headline: BofA Revises Eversource (ES) Estimates Lower, Keeps Buy Rating
summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is included among the 14 Cheap DRIP Stocks to Buy Now. On March 27, BofA analyst Ross Fowler lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) to $73 from $82. It maintained a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said it revised its FY26–28 EPS estimates to reflect a full […]
